workspace.app_name: 你的 PRD IDE 名称
workspace.slogan: 让PM跟工程师一样用上能够信息补全和自动联想的办公效率产品（跟用 IDE 一样）

customization_steps: Replace cross_page_assets and demo_documents with your team PRD/MRD examples
Adjust flash_insight, market_landscape, next_edit_patterns, style_fingerprints, glossary, delivery_rules, and section_templates
Set PRD_KNOWLEDGE_PACK_PATH to the copied JSON file
